reviews.comment:
Un buen sitio para recargar combustible. La atencion es de primera. El playero muy amable y siempre con una sonrisa. Aunque llegué de madrugada no hubo ningun ptoblema en atencion y servicio. Ya habia pasado otras veces durante el dia y siempre la misma calidad. Me gusta parar aqui antes de cruzar el puente a Paydandu.

(Translated by Google)
A great place to refuel. The service is excellent. The attendant is very friendly and always has a smile. Even though I arrived in the early hours, there were no problems with the service. I've stopped here several times during the day and the quality is always the same. I like to stop here before crossing the bridge to Paydandu.

reviews.comment:
Drugstore surtido, y muy buena atención de las chicas.
Para compra de combustible, desayunar etc, precios un poco caros
Buena atencion y los baños en buen estado y limpios

(Translated by Google)
The drugstore is well-stocked, and the staff are very helpful.
For fuel, breakfast, etc., prices are a bit high. However, the service is good, and the restrooms are clean and in good condition.
